metadata.description: Private plugin marketplace for the dYdX Digital team. Solutions architecture and delivery tooling — stage-gated client pipelines, platform-specific skills, internal automation.

plugins.name: dydx-delivery
plugins.description: Stage-gated client delivery pipeline. Twelve skills: kickoff-capture, discovery-intake, generate-sow, generate-fnspec-platform (4a), generate-fnspec-integration (4b), generate-technical-spec, generate-test-plan, generate-build-prompt (for Claude Code), execute-tests, plus three platform reference skills (platform-pipefy / platform-wrike / platform-ziflow). Every stage produces a versioned, human-reviewed artefact.
